safe.title: I'm safe
safe.intro: Share your status to reassure your family. It only takes a moment.

missing.title: Report a missing person
missing.intro: Give the name and last known location so others can help find them.

needHelp.title: I need help
needHelp.intro: Describe what you need. It will appear on the map for rescuers and volunteers.

canHelp.title: I can help
canHelp.intro: Offer whatever you can. Your offer will appear on the map for those who need it.

report.title: Report a damaged building
report.intro: Help map structural damage. Give the location and the severity.
